jsonld.name: Aesthetic-Structural Translation Strain
jsonld.description: The interpretive effort of converting architectural quality indicators into appropriate aesthetic vocabulary, involving uncertainty about which aesthetic terms accurately describe detected structural patterns and whether the translation preserves or distorts what's being measured.
